WORKSHEET #9 - Creating the Frame of Your Professional or Business Story
What is the thesis of your business story? What is the moment of transformation or
realization that you want to share?
Step #1: Ending Your Story
Begin by asking yourself: What is your 5 second moment? This is the singular
moment in time when the transformation or realization took place.
This is the end of your story.
Step #2: Beginning Your Story
What is the opposite of your 5 second moment? This will become the beginning of
your story.
Step #3: Creating Your Thesis Statement
Now you can complete your thesis statement. This will guide all decisions_that
need to be made in the crafting of your story.
My company/my product/my service/I used to be
but now my company/my product/my service/I am
